title: 有馬記念の後に・情熱を世界に！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is the victor of the dream match.
Not only that, she also brought tons of
excitement to the crowd and competition as an
incredible entertainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the award ceremony, El Condor Pasa declares
her intention to make future races just as exciting
and entertaining as she takes on the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa has shown her true potential as an
entertainer. Cheers and praise echo endlessly at
the racecourse.
